description_long: This is a compact, single-serve coffee machine with a sleek, modern design, primarily finished in glossy black plastic. The front features a prominent dispensing spout above a circular drip tray, with a translucent water reservoir on one side. The top section is smoothly contoured, likely housing the coffee pod compartment, and a set of small, round control buttons is visible on the upper right surface. A power cord extends from the back, connecting to a standard wall outlet, indicating its electric operation. The water reservoir is semi-transparent, allowing the water level to be easily monitored. The overall build is sturdy and functional, suitable for countertop use in urban environments such as offices, cafes, or communal spaces.
description: A compact, glossy black single-serve coffee machine with a visible water reservoir and power cord, designed for countertop use. Features include a dispensing spout, drip tray, and a set of control buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dispensing spout, drip tray, control buttons, and the water reservoir on the left side, with the power cord plugged into a wall outlet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth, curved body and the front spout, with the water reservoir partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the machine, the full width of the water reservoir, and the power cord extending to the outlet.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the water reservoir more clearly, the drip tray, and the power cord connection.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A row of small, round buttons located on the upper right surface of the machine, likely for selecting brew options.
